summary: Completed e2e testing of multi-shift timing controls feature. All backend APIs working correctly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend admin login, settings page, and menu page timing controls all functional. Customer menu page showing ADD buttons correctly when restaurant is open.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/config/709 returns 200 with restaurantOpen, restaurantShifts, categoryTimings, itemTimings fields
Backend: PUT /api/config/ saves restaurantOpen toggle correctly
Backend: PUT /api/config/ saves restaurantShifts array correctly (multiple shifts)
Backend: PUT /api/config/ saves categoryTimings object correctly
Backend: PUT /api/config/ saves itemTimings object correctly
Backend: Admin login with email=owner@youngmonk.com and password=admin123 returns token
Frontend: Admin login flow works - email -> password -> redirect to /admin/settings
Frontend: Admin Settings page loads with data-testid='admin-settings-page'
Frontend: Restaurant Open toggle visible at data-testid='restaurant-open-toggle' and clickable
Frontend: Shift rows displayed with data-testid='shift-row-0' and time inputs
Frontend: Add Shift button (data-testid='add-shift-btn') adds new shift rows up to 4 max
Frontend: Remove button (data-testid='shift-0-remove') visible when >1 shift
Frontend: When toggle is OFF, shift controls are visually dimmed (opacity behavior)
Frontend: Admin Menu Page loads with TimingEditor on category cards
Frontend: 21 category timing displays found at data-testid='timing-display-cat-{id}'
Frontend: Timing editor opens on click showing time inputs
Frontend: 9 item timing displays visible when category expanded at data-testid='timing-display-item-{id}'
Frontend: Customer menu page (/709/menu) loads correctly
Frontend: ADD buttons visible (173 found) when restaurant is open and within shift times
Frontend: Menu FAB button visible at bottom right
critical_code_review_comments: The backend GET /api/config/{restaurant_id} endpoint correctly returns defaults for new restaurants, and saves timing fields when updated for existing restaurants
The RestaurantConfigContext.jsx correctly handles null/undefined timing fields by providing sensible defaults
The itemAvailability.js utility correctly implements the cascade logic: live_web -> category timing -> item timing -> POS times -> 24hr default
seed_data_creation: Updated restaurant 709 config with timing fields during testing (reset to defaults after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-shift timing controls feature is fully implemented and tested. The admin can: 1) Toggle restaurant open/closed via master switch, 2) Configure up to 4 operating shifts, 3) Set category-level timing overrides in Menu Order page, 4) Set item-level timing overrides. The customer menu page correctly shows/hides ADD buttons based on this cascade. All data-testid attributes are in place for testing.
